meta.description: Knowledge base entries for normalized test steps and expected results.

entries.title: N_20_Broker_Call_01_Broker_Call_Two_Outgoing_Calls
entries.raw_action:
Phone A calls phone B (phone models are specified in system_config field)

Phone B takes the call
entries.raw_expected_result: Communication is established between phone A and phone B
entries.normalized_action: phone A dials phone B.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Communication is established between phone A and phone B.

entries.title: N_20_Broker_Call_01_Broker_Call_Two_Outgoing_Calls
entries.raw_action:

Phone C takes the call
entries.raw_expected_result:
Communication is established between phone A and phone C

Phone B is put on hold and plays the on hold tone
entries.normalized_action: phone A presses the New call key and dials phone C.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Communication is established between phone A and phone C. Phone B is put on hold and plays the on hold tone.

entries.title: N_20_Hold_Retrieve_01_Put_On_Hold_&_Retrieve
entries.raw_action:
Phone A put phone B on hold

(obsolete on SIP: if A is multilined A have to go back to ""perso"" page and
press the active line key to hold the on going communication

if not there is a ""hold"" key in the communication screen)
entries.raw_expected_result: Phone B plays on hold tone
entries.normalized_action: phone A puts phone B on Hold.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone B plays on-hold tone.

entries.raw_action: Phone A retrieve call
entries.raw_expected_result: Communication is established between phone A and phone B
entries.normalized_action: phone A retrieves the call.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Communication is re-established between phone A and phone B.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Back_01_Call_Back_To_Free_Phone
entries.raw_action:

Phone B does not take the call
entries.raw_expected_result: Phone B rings
entries.normalized_action: phone A calls phone B.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone B rings.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Back_01_Call_Back_To_Free_Phone
entries.raw_action:
On phone A press the ""Call back"" key

Note: not applicable on OXO.
entries.raw_expected_result:
Phone B stops ringing

Phone B is notified that there is a call back request
entries.normalized_action: On phone A, press the Call back key.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone B stops ringing, and phone B is notified that there is a call back request.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Back_01_Call_Back_To_Free_Phone

entries.raw_expected_result:
Phone B display the call back request and can select it to see who called
(here phone A)
entries.normalized_action: On phone B, press the letter iconed physical key.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone B displays the call back request and can select it to see who called.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Back_01_Call_Back_To_Free_Phone
entries.raw_action:

entries.raw_expected_result: There is no call back request anymore on phone B
entries.normalized_action: phone B calls back phone A.
entries.normalized_expected_result: There is no call back request anymore on phone B.

entries.title: N_20_Make_Call_05_Basic_Call_To_Busy
entries.raw_action: Phone A calls phone B (phone models are specified in system_config field)
entries.raw_expected_result:
Phone A plays busy tone and displays that phone B is busy (for OXO ""Out of service"")

Phone A also gives the opportunity to make a call back by pressing the right
physical key (not on SIP devices)

RBH : voice indication that dialed number is busy
entries.normalized_action: phone A calls phone B.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone A plays busy tone and displays that phone B is busy. For OXO, it displays "Out of service". Phone A also gives the opportunity to make a callback by pressing the right physical key, but not on SIP devices. RBH: voice indication that the dialed number is busy.

entries.title: N_20_Make_Call_06_Basic_Call_To_Wrong_Number
entries.raw_action:
1.

Phone A calls a phone number that does not exist
entries.raw_expected_result:
1.

Phone A displays that the dialed number is a wrong number and then becomes
idle again.

OXE: It displays ""xxx can not be reached"".

RBH : Voice message says that dialed number is not available
entries.normalized_action: phone A calls a phone number that does not exist.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone A displays that the dialed number is a wrong number and then becomes idle again. In OXE, it displays "xxx can not be reached". RBH voice message says that dialed number is not available.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Log_01_Call_Log_Incoming_Calls
entries.raw_action: Phone B hangs up
entries.raw_expected_result:
Phone A stops ringing

The Phone A call log contains a new entry containing the right information
about the call : missed call, date (and hour) of the call, full number of the
caller, ... same information with the ""incoming call"" filter
entries.normalized_action: phone B hangs up the call.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone A stops ringing. The call log on phone A displays a new missed call entry with correct details, including date, time, and caller number, matching the incoming call filter.

entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone B rings and answers the call. Communication is established between phone A and phone B.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Log_01_Call_Log_Incoming_Calls

entries.title: N_20_Call_Log_03_Call_Log_Forwarded_Call
entries.raw_action: Phone B defines an immediate forward to phone C
entries.raw_expected_result: Forward is taken into account
entries.normalized_action: In OXE, configure phone B with an immediate forward to phone C.
entries.normalized_expected_result: The forward configuration is applied successfully.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Log_03_Call_Log_Forwarded_Call
entries.raw_action: Phone A calls phone B
entries.raw_expected_result:
Phone B is not notified

Phone C rings and take the call : communication between phone A and phone C is
established
entries.normalized_action: phone A makes an outgoing call to phone B.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone B does not receive a notification. Phone C rings, and the remote side answers the call. Communication is established between Phone A and Phone C.

entries.title: N_20_Call_Log_03_Call_Log_Forwarded_Call
entries.raw_action: End the communication
entries.raw_expected_result:
Phone A and C are idle

Phone A call log has a new entry:

  • 1 answered call with phone B information and showing that call has been answered by C (can be seen with : all, outgoing, redirected filters)

Phone C call log display a standard forwarded incoming call from A showing that call was initialy for B
entries.normalized_action: End the communication.
entries.normalized_expected_result: Phone A and Phone C are idle. Phone A call log displays a new entry: one answered call with Phone B information, showing the call was answered by Phone C, visible with all, outgoing, and redirected filters. Phone C call log displays a standard forwarded incoming call from Phone A, showing the call was initially for Phone B.
